scope: Chunk 2 - Phase 2 browser/real-use validation after PR #188 merge

preflight.git_status: main...origin/main; only old untracked Phase 1 evidence plus new Phase 2 screenshots present
preflight.head: bdd23485c9c174fff96130fdd2a0cb2bc9c8f28f
preflight.docker_compose: QueryCraft backend/frontend up; postgres, redis, mysql, mssql services healthy where applicable

provider_observation.reason: Live query submission was not reached because the real app had no available database connection and disabled the prompt.

blocker_triage_2026_07_04.root_cause: Stale dev platform DB state after RBAC/source-connection hardening. The configured source_analytics row existed, but was active/untested with no successful schema introspection and no Admin role_connection_policies row. The dbTest-backed Postgres source DB itself was reachable and populated.

fix.summary: Updated the existing E2E seed script to repair the configured source connection from backend environment, run normal health/introspection service methods, and seed the built-in Admin role policy from introspected schema entries.
fix.runtime_repair: Copied the patched support script into the running backend container and executed it there so it used the same Compose network and environment as the real app.

commands.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec -T backend python /tmp/seed_e2e_connection.py

cd backend && rtk uv run pytest tests/unit/api/test_connections.py tests/unit/api/test_admin_connections.py tests/unit/services/test_connection_service.py tests/unit/test_role_connection_policy_model.py tests/unit/test_role_endpoints.py -x --tb=short
cd backend && rtk uv run ruff check src/seed_e2e_connection.py
cd backend && rtk uv run ruff format --check src/seed_e2e_connection.py

browser_flows.flow: Open frontend and sign in through UI
browser_flows.evidence: Signed in as configured local admin through the UI; credential values not captured.

browser_flows.flow: Create a new chat/session and verify prompt focus/draft/preview behavior
browser_flows.evidence: After New Chat, prompt textarea was disabled with placeholder: Please add a database connection first. This prevents prompt focus, draft entry, session creation, and preview verification.

browser_flows.flow: Submit benign real query using configured Gemini provider
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked by disabled prompt/no available database connection.

browser_flows.flow: Verify accepted query appears in History
Create second session and verify session isolation
browser_flows.evidence: Blocked before first session could be created.

browser_flows.flow: Submit follow-up question and verify prior context behavior

browser_flows.evidence: Not run after first required browser-flow blocker.

browser_flows.flow: Arabic RTL mirroring while SQL/code remains LTR
browser_flows.evidence: Not run after first required browser-flow blocker.

security_privacy.notes: Evidence is summarized. Credentials were read from .env for UI login but not stored in evidence.
